element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Finite but abundant resource; long-range option vs melee
Scattered throughout levels; essential for survival
Traded with Peddler for lives and wishes
Eliminates all on-screen enemies; rare power-up
Two tokens unlock Abu bonus level with distinct mechanics
Escalate in complexity and density through game
Increase in variety and density mid-game

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Classic linear difficulty progression with alternating combat and platforming sections; tension builds through enemy density and hazard complexity; relief provided by checkpoints and collectibles; bonus minigame offers rhythmic break in main level flow

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden Aladdin head icons reward exploration off main path
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Golden Aladdin head icons hidden in levels; blue vases mark safe checkpoints and designated path progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics (scimitar, apples, health system) in controlled enemy/hazard density; abundant resource availability
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Enemy variety and density increases; environmental hazard complexity escalates; resource scarcity becomes factor; introduction of power-ups and bonus mechanics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained high pressure from enemies and hazards; boss encounters; cumulative mastery of all mechanics required
notable_spikes: Transition from basic platforming to complex environmental navigation

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level contains a Peddler NPC who trades gems for extra lives and wishes, creating resource management micro-cycles within main level flow
Post-level minigame triggered by Genie Token collection; luck-based reward system (gems, apples, lives) with Jafar symbol as failure state; varies rounds by token count
Triggered after collecting two Abu Tokens across the game; shifts protagonist to Abu monkey; vertical falling/dodging mechanic differs from Aladdin platforming; single-hit failure model
Blue vases serve as spatial waypoints marking safe advancement; distribute difficulty by dividing levels into checkpoint-to-checkpoint segments

sources_used: Wikipedia: Disney's Aladdin (Sega Genesis video game)
